overview: Gestion Resto Fork is a comprehensive restaurant management SaaS application covering operations, kitchen logistics, HR, and finance. It features 17+ pages with real-time data synchronization, scenario-based financial projections, and detailed P&L reporting.
features: Simulateur Carte / Laboratoire with dual performance + margin classification filters
Projections Financières: merged Projections + Rentabilité + Business Plan with 1/12/60-month horizons
Expanded Comptabilité with visual P&L and Capacité d'Autofinancement (annual + monthly)
Restaurant, RH, Finance, and Paramètres modules with React Query data sync
